name: airtrail
tagline: A digital flight logbook for tracking pilot activity and flight hours
description: AirTrail is a personalized flight logbook app for pilots. It allows storing flight entries, tracking totals and hours, and visualizing flight activity. It also includes privacy-first self-hosting features and import/export options.

features.title: Flight Tracking
features.description: Logs personal flight history and travel details

features.title: Trip Visualization
features.description: Displays routes and destinations on a map

features.title: Statistics Overview
features.description: Provides summaries such as distance traveled and countries visited

features.title: Data Import
features.description: Imports flight data from external services
